title: Stale exported G-code still contains original long blank-feed risk
trigger: Burn previously exported G-code instead of regenerating from current source
failureMode: 164 G1 S0 moves over 5 mm, max 20.935 mm
consequence: Visible stray-line risk remains in this artifact
fix: Regenerate G-code and add build/emitter metadata to future exports

title: Preflight does not catch long blanked feed moves
trigger: G-code contains long G1 S0 moves
failureMode: laser-on-travel invariant only checks G0 semantics
consequence: Preflight can pass output that visibly marks material
fix: Add findLongBlankFeedMoves and wire into preflight

title: ADR-035 still permits up to 5 mm feed-blank gaps
trigger: Fill spans separated by gap <= 5 mm
failureMode: Gap remains G1 S0 at feed speed
consequence: Small bridge/counter marks may remain on sensitive material
fix: Make threshold configurable or derive from A/B hardware tests

title: Small lettering is geometry-limited in supplied .lf2
failureMode: Tiny contours get very few hatch rows and micro-spans
consequence: Small letters look muddy or uneven
fix: Prefer raster/image or real vector/text source; add small-feature warning

title: Raster compile can allocate unbounded burn grids and G-code strings
failureMode: Full luma, S-value, and G-code string allocated before budget/preflight
consequence: Freeze or OOM before useful operator warning
fix: Add raster pixel/G-code/runtime budget before allocation

title: Trace preview can be overwritten by stale async results
trigger: Trace options change while prior trace is still running
failureMode: No token check after await traceImageWithFallback
consequence: Preview can show older options than commit will use
fix: Check request token after await in success and error paths

title: Raster import ignores embedded DPI despite workflow claiming DPI sizing
failureMode: DPI parser not present; fallback 96 DPI used
consequence: Physical size can be wrong versus source file and LightBurn expectation
fix: Parse PNG pHYs, JPEG JFIF/EXIF density and add fixtures

title: Preview toolpath can differ from emitted G-code
trigger: Preview optimized multi-path job then save/start
failureMode: Preview uses raw compileJob; output uses optimizePaths and origin placement
consequence: Preview approval does not prove hardware path/order
fix: Share prepared-output pipeline across preview, estimate, save, frame, start

title: Stop/Pause/Disconnect write failures are not surfaced as safety alerts
trigger: Serial write rejects during running job safety action
failureMode: UI discards promises and only logs/stores failure
consequence: Operator may believe stop/pause/disconnect command was sent
fix: Catch failures and show persistent physical E-stop/power alert

title: Cable-yank mid-job leaves ambiguous UI recovery
trigger: Cable yank or OS port close while streaming
failureMode: Disconnected streamer state is not surfaced as strong recovery banner
consequence: Operator may not understand buffered motion/position uncertainty
fix: Add terminal job recovery banner and acknowledgement

title: Save G-code skips Start's intent warnings
trigger: Export G-code instead of direct Start
consequence: Hardware workflow gets fewer warnings when exported
fix: Share preparation/warning path for Save and Start

title: Raster preview supports transforms that raster output rejects
trigger: Rotate/mirror image or convert transformed vector to bitmap
failureMode: Preview renders transform but preflight rejects output
consequence: Preview can be plausible but not executable
fix: Warn/block before invalid state or implement transformed raster output

title: Import Image can collide with existing non-image #808080 layer
trigger: Project already has vector layer using default raster color
failureMode: ensureRasterImageLayer no-ops and image lands on non-image layer
consequence: Visible imported image is not ready to engrave
fix: Create unique image layer or decouple raster layer binding from color
